title: Resolve curvature-accounting condition: C6: J_curv far-zone flux neutrality
description: Sector: J_curv far-zone flux. Allowed condition: I_curv = 0 in ordinary exterior unless a future curvature-current law derives neutral transport. Forbidden condition: nonzero curvature-current sphere flux shifts or mimics exterior mass. Consequence: curvature flux is not an ordinary mass flux coin..
